creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,
this is from poudriere i need radare2 for iaito package.
https://github.com/radareorg/radare2/issues/23568

-I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/radare2/work/radare2-5.9.6/libr/../shlr/bochs/include/ -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/radare2/work/radare2-5.9.6/libr/../shlr/gdb/include/ -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/radare2/work/radare2-5.9.6/libr/../shlr/qnx/include/ -Ip/librapwrap/include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/radare2/work/radare2-5.9.6/libr/../shlr/winkd/ -DXNU_USE_PTRACE=0 -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/radare2/work/radare2-5.9.6/libr/../shlr/sdb/include -fvisibility=hidden -o p/debug_native.o p/debug_native.c
p/debug_native.c:671:3: error: expected expression
  671 |                 struct ptrace_xstate_info info;
      |                 ^
p/debug_native.c:672:51: error: use of undeclared identifier 'info'
  672 |                 ret = ptrace (PT_GETXSTATE_INFO, pid, (caddr_t)&info, sizeof (info));
      |                                                                 ^
p/debug_native.c:672:65: error: use of undeclared identifier 'info'
  672 |                 ret = ptrace (PT_GETXSTATE_INFO, pid, (caddr_t)&info, sizeof (info));
      |                                                                               ^
p/debug_native.c:673:7: error: use of undeclared identifier 'info'
  673 |                 if (info.xsave_len != 0) {
      |                     ^
p/debug_native.c:674:50: error: use of undeclared identifier 'info'
  674 |                 ret = ptrace (PT_GETXSTATE, pid, (caddr_t)buf, info.xsave_len);
      |                                                                ^
p/debug_native.c:1083:8: warning: variable 'map_is_shared' set but not used [-Wunused-but-set-variable]
 1083 |                 bool map_is_shared = false;
      |                      ^
p/debug_native.c:1025:6: warning: unused variable 'ign' [-Wunused-variable]
 1025 |         int ign;
      |             ^~~
p/debug_native.c:1026:7: warning: unused variable 'unkstr' [-Wunused-variable]
 1026 |         char unkstr[128];
      |              ^~~~~~
3 warnings and 5 errors generated.
